name: HealthParticipant
privacy_notes: healthIds values are sector-specific identifiers (ABHA, NMC, PMJAY etc.) — treat as sensitive PII, never expose in list views
dateOfBirth is PII — restrict to contract parties
gender is PII — restrict to contract parties
credentialRefs may contain W3C VCs with PII in credentialSubject — access-control document URLs
